name: Offer Submitted
description: Buyer submits Letter of Intent (LOI). Seller reviews and acknowledges.

name: KYC/AML Verification
description: All parties undergo identity, beneficial ownership, sanctions and PEP screening.

name: Due Diligence
description: Buyer's team reviews property condition, title, environmental, and financial documents.

name: Escrow Management
description: Escrow opened with agent. Earnest money deposited. Release conditions tracked on-chain.

name: Contract Negotiation
description: Sales & Purchase Agreement drafted, redlined, and digitally signed. Smart contract terms recorded.

name: Closing
description: Final walkthrough, deed recordation, funds released from escrow, blockchain audit archive.
